title: Japan's crude imports in structural decline and increasingly dependent on Saudi Arabia, UAE
section_path: Japan's crude imports in structural decline and increasingly dependent on Saudi Arabia, UAE
section_path_text: Japan's crude imports in structural decline and increasingly dependent on Saudi Arabia, UAE
summary:
Main
This blog explores the outlook on Japan's crude imports and the status of country's import basket. By Ivan Mathews
Japan's crude imports have been on a decline from 2022 to 2024 . This was due to a confluence of factors - falling domestic demand for transportation fuels due to an ageing and shrinking population, and the shift towards lower-carbon fuels.
